FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/RunDetail.razor
LENGTH 36355
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Configuration
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@using Microsoft.Extensions.Options
@inject IRunService RunService
@inject RunActionsService RunActions
@inject TabService TabService
@inject RunEventBroker RunEvents
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject ILogger<RunDetail> Logger
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject IOptions<UiSettings> UiOptions
@inject IOptions<NxtUI.Configuration.RunsSettings> RunsOptions
@inject ILogPathDiscoveryService DiscoverySvc
@inject TopologyHintLoader HintLoader
@inject ILogger<PerformanceEventService> EventServiceLogger
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@implements IAsyncDisposable

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string? RunId { get; set; }
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool IsFocused { get; set; }

    private bool _previousIsFocused;
    private bool _allowNextRender = true;

    // ── Data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private RunDetails? _details;
    private bool _loading = true;

    private PerformanceEventService? _eventService;
    private TopologyComputationService? _topologyService;
    private Func<string, string>? _labelFormatter;

    // "Debounced" recompute without per-event allocation: DebouncedTopologyCompute (called
    // once per incoming event/poll batch) just flips a flag; a single PeriodicTimer loop
    // recomputes at most once per tick if something changed since the last one. Same
    // worst-case latency as a true debounce, but no CancellationTokenSource/Task.Delay
    // churn per event on high-volume live runs.
    private volatile bool _topologyDirty;
    private PeriodicTimer? _topologyTimer;
    private const int TopologyDebounceMs = 400;

    // ── Topology (live and replay) ────────────────────────────────────────
    private Topology? _topology;
    private int _eventCount;

    // ── Run-type topology hint (optional blueprint) ───────────────────────
    private TopologyHintFile? _hintFile;
    private TopologyVariant?  _chosenVariant;   // the default or a matched variant (may still switch until locked)
    private bool              _variantLocked;   // true once a non-default variant matched — never flips after
    private TopologyBlueprint? _blueprint;      // compiled from _chosenVariant; recompiled only when it changes

    // Single shared instance instead of "?? new Topology()" inline in the markup —
    // that allocated a NEW instance every render while _topology was still null
    // (before the first compute), which defeated D3FlowGraph's reference-equality
    // change-detection on its Topology parameter during that window.
    private static readonly Topology EmptyTopology = new();

    // ── Replay mode (Step 8) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    private DateTime? _replayTimestamp;
    private bool IsReplay => _replayTimestamp.HasValue;

    // Slider uses 0–1000 integer steps; converted to/from timestamps internally.
    private DateTime _sliderMin;
    private DateTime _sliderMax;
    private double   _sliderValue;   // 0–1000
    private const double SliderSteps = 1000.0;

    // ── Replay playback (auto-advance) ──────────────────────────────────────
    // Animates the slider from wherever it currently sits to the end. Capped at
    // PlaybackMaxDurationMs of real wall-clock time for a full 0→SliderSteps sweep —
    // pausing partway through and resuming later only extends how long it *takes*,
    // never how far a given resume-to-end stretch travels per second.
    private const double PlaybackMaxDurationMs = 30_000;
    private bool _isPlaying;
    private CancellationTokenSource? _playbackCts;

    // ── UI ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    // Persisted in localStorage (bm-rundetail-expanded) so it survives across tabs,
    // sessions, and app restarts — read back in OnAfterRenderAsync's firstRender.
    private bool _detailsExpanded;
    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;
    private const string DetailsExpandedStorageKey = "bm-rundetail-expanded";

    // ── Errors dialog ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    // Shows every errored event across the run (not replay-clamped — an error is an error
    // regardless of where the replay slider sits), read straight from the event store and
    // filtered client-side. The graph's per-pipeline popover opens this pre-filtered.
    private bool _errorsDialogOpen;
    private string  _errorsFilterText       = string.Empty;
    private string? _errorsFilterParseError;
    private FilterNode? _errorsFilterAst;
    private List<PerformanceEvent> _filteredErrors = [];
    // Total errored events in the store — cached per topology recompute so the topbar badge
    // doesn't scan every event on each render.
    private int _errorCount;

    private static readonly string[] ErrorSearchableFields =
        ["Service", "Server", "Pipeline", "Name", "Source", "Info", "Error"];

    private static readonly Dictionary<string, string> ErrorFilterAliases = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
    {
        ["svc"] = "Service",   ["service"] = "Service",
        ["pipe"] = "Pipeline", ["pipeline"] = "Pipeline",
        ["srv"] = "Server",    ["server"] = "Server", ["host"] = "Server",
        ["pid"] = "ProcessId", ["processid"] = "ProcessId",
        ["src"] = "Source",    ["source"] = "Source",
        ["chunk"] = "Name",    ["chunkid"] = "Name", ["name"] = "Name",
        ["info"] = "Info",
        ["err"] = "Error",     ["error"] = "Error",
        ["time"] = "Start",    ["start"] = "Start",
    };

    private static readonly FilterParser ErrorFilterParser = new(ErrorSearchableFields, ErrorFilterAliases);

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _errorFieldHints =
    [
        ("svc / service",       "service"),
        ("host / srv / server", "host / server"),
        ("pid",                 "process id"),
        ("pipe / pipeline",     "pipeline"),
        ("chunk / name",        "chunk"),
        ("src / source",        "source / handler"),
        ("info",                "info text"),
        ("err / error",         "error message"),
        ("time / start",        "time"),
    ];

    // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        _topologyService   = new TopologyComputationService(
            TimeSpan.FromSeconds(RunsOptions.Value.TopologyRecentActivityWindowSeconds));
        _labelFormatter    = TopologyLabelFormatter.Build(UiOptions.Value.LabelStripWords, Environment);

        _topologyTimer = new PeriodicTimer(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(TopologyDebounceMs));
        _ = RunTopologyLoopAsync();

        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (!firstRender) return;
        try
        {
            _appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=7");
            var stored = await _appModule.InvokeAsync<string?>("getLocalStorage", DetailsExpandedStorageKey);
            var expanded = stored == "1";
            if (expanded != _detailsExpanded)
            {
                _detailsExpanded = expanded;
                StateHasChanged();
            }
        }
        catch (Exception ex) { Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Failed to read persisted details-strip state"); }
    }

    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;

        var gained = IsFocused && !_previousIsFocused;
        var lost   = !IsFocused && _previousIsFocused;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (_eventService is not null) _eventService.IsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (gained)      StateHasChanged();
        else if (lost) { _allowNextRender = true; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    protected override bool ShouldRender()
    {
        if (IsFocused) return true;
        if (_allowNextRender) { _allowNextRender = false; return true; }
        return false;
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        Tab?.BeginLoading();
        TabService.NotifyChanged();
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            _details = await RunService.GetRunDetailsAsync(Environment, RunId ?? string.Empty);
            if (_details is not null && RunId is not null)
            {
                // Tab label is "{Type} {RunId}" — Type is only known now that details
                // have loaded (the tab was opened with just the RunId as a placeholder).
                if (Tab is not null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_details.Type))
                    TabService.RenameTab(Tab.Id, $"{_details.Type} {_details.RunId}");

                // Optional per-run-type topology blueprint (null when no hint file exists).
                _hintFile = HintLoader.Get(_details.Type);

                await StartEventServiceAsync();
            }
        }
        catch { _details = null; }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private async Task StartEventServiceAsync()
    {
        if (_details is null || RunId is null) return;

        _eventService = new PerformanceEventService(RunService, EventServiceLogger);

        await _eventService.StartAsync(
            env:            Environment,
            runId:          RunId,
            startTime: _details.Start,
            isRunning:      _details.Status == RunStatus.Running,
            isFocused:      IsFocused,
            onEventsUpdated: DebouncedTopologyCompute,
            eventBroker:    RunEvents);
    }

    private void DebouncedTopologyCompute() => _topologyDirty = true;

    private async Task RunTopologyLoopAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            // WaitForNextTickAsync returns false once the timer is disposed (component
            // teardown) — ends the loop gracefully with no separate cancellation token needed.
            while (await _topologyTimer!.WaitForNextTickAsync())
            {
                if (!_topologyDirty) continue;
                _topologyDirty = false;
                await RecomputeTopologyAsync();
            }
        }
        catch (ObjectDisposedException) { /* timer disposed mid-tick during teardown */ }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            // This loop runs fire-and-forget from OnInitializedAsync — an uncaught exception
            // here would silently stop all further topology recomputation for the rest of
            // the tab's lifetime with no log at all.
            Logger.LogError(ex, "RunTopologyLoopAsync failed");
        }
    }

    // Picks (and locks) the variant from the services seen so far, then compiles it to a
    // blueprint — recompiling only when the chosen variant actually changes. Returns null
    // when there's no hint file, or no variant matches and there's no default.
    private TopologyBlueprint? ResolveBlueprint(IEnumerable<PerformanceEvent> events)
    {
        if (_hintFile is null) return null;

        if (!_variantLocked)
        {
            var seen = events.Select(e => e.Service).Where(s => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(s)).Distinct().ToList();
            var chosen = TopologyBlueprint.SelectVariant(_hintFile, seen);

            if (!ReferenceEquals(chosen, _chosenVariant))
            {
                _chosenVariant = chosen;
                _blueprint = chosen is null ? null : TopologyBlueprint.Compile(chosen);
            }
            // A matched (non-default) variant is final — stop re-evaluating on later events.
            if (chosen is not null && !ReferenceEquals(chosen, _hintFile.Default))
                _variantLocked = true;
        }

        return _blueprint;
    }

    private async Task RecomputeTopologyAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            if (_eventService is null || _topologyService is null) return;

            if (_eventService.DetectedStatus is { } detected && _details is not null)
                _details.Status = detected;

            var allEvents = _eventService.Events;

            IReadOnlyDictionary<string, PerformanceEvent> filtered = _replayTimestamp.HasValue
                ? allEvents.Where(kv => kv.Value.Start <= _replayTimestamp.Value)
                           .ToDictionary(kv => kv.Key, kv => kv.Value)
                : allEvents;

            // Variant selection uses the FULL set of services seen (not replay-clamped) —
            // the blueprint shape shouldn't change as you scrub the replay slider.
            var blueprint = ResolveBlueprint(allEvents.Values);

            _topology   = _topologyService.ComputeTopology(filtered, _labelFormatter, blueprint);
            _eventCount = _eventService.EventCount;
            _errorCount = allEvents.Values.Count(e => e.IsError);

            UpdateSliderRange(allEvents.Values);

            // Keep the errors dialog live while it's open (new errors can arrive mid-run).
            if (_errorsDialogOpen) RebuildFilteredErrors();

            await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Topology compute failed");
        }
    }

    // ── Slider & Replay ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void UpdateSliderRange(IEnumerable<PerformanceEvent> events)
    {
        var list = events.ToList();
        if (list.Count == 0) return;

        _sliderMin = list.Min(e => e.Start);
        _sliderMax = list.Max(e => e.Finish ?? e.Start);

        // In LIVE mode keep the thumb at the right edge.
        if (!IsReplay) _sliderValue = SliderSteps;
    }

    // Convert 0–1000 slider position to a DateTime within [_sliderMin, _sliderMax].
    private DateTime SliderToDateTime(double value)
    {
        if (_sliderMax <= _sliderMin) return _sliderMax;
        var fraction = Math.Clamp(value / SliderSteps, 0.0, 1.0);
        var totalMs  = (_sliderMax - _sliderMin).TotalMilliseconds;
        return _sliderMin.AddMilliseconds(fraction * totalMs);
    }

    private void OnSliderChanged(double value)
    {
        // A manual drag always wins over an in-progress auto-play.
        if (_isPlaying) StopPlayback();

        _sliderValue = value;

        // Snap to LIVE when dragged to/past the right edge.
        if (value >= SliderSteps - 1)
        {
            EnterLiveMode();
            return;
        }

        _replayTimestamp = SliderToDateTime(value);
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private void EnterLiveMode()
    {
        _replayTimestamp = null;
        _sliderValue     = SliderSteps;
        DebouncedTopologyCompute();
    }

    private void TogglePlayback()
    {
        if (_isPlaying)
        {
            StopPlayback();
            return;
        }
        if (_sliderMax <= _sliderMin) return;

        // Starting fresh from LIVE begins at the very start of the run; resuming from a
        // paused mid-replay position (or a manually-scrubbed one) continues from there.
        if (!IsReplay)
        {
            _sliderValue     = 0;
            _replayTimestamp = SliderToDateTime(0);
            DebouncedTopologyCompute();
        }

        _isPlaying = true;
        _playbackCts?.Cancel();
        _playbackCts?.Dispose();
        _playbackCts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        _ = RunPlaybackLoopAsync(_sliderValue, _playbackCts.Token);
    }

    private void StopPlayback()
    {
        _isPlaying = false;
        _playbackCts?.Cancel();
    }

    private async Task RunPlaybackLoopAsync(double startValue, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        // The 30s budget covers a full 0→SliderSteps sweep; resuming partway through only
        // animates the remaining fraction, at the same per-step rate, so playback never
        // speeds up or slows down when paused and resumed.
        var remainingFraction = 1.0 - (startValue / SliderSteps);
        var remainingMs = PlaybackMaxDurationMs * remainingFraction;
        if (remainingMs <= 0) { EnterLiveMode(); _isPlaying = false; await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged); return; }

        var startWall = DateTime.UtcNow;
        using var timer = new PeriodicTimer(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(50));
        try
        {
            while (await timer.WaitForNextTickAsync(ct))
            {
                var elapsedMs = (DateTime.UtcNow - startWall).TotalMilliseconds;
                var progress  = Math.Min(1.0, elapsedMs / remainingMs);
                _sliderValue     = startValue + (SliderSteps - startValue) * progress;
                _replayTimestamp = SliderToDateTime(_sliderValue);
                DebouncedTopologyCompute();
                await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);

                if (progress >= 1.0)
                {
                    _isPlaying = false;
                    EnterLiveMode(); // arrived at the end — same data as live, so just go live
                    await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { /* paused or component disposed */ }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            // Fire-and-forget from TogglePlayback — an uncaught exception here would silently
            // freeze the replay animation with no log and no way for the user to tell why.
            Logger.LogError(ex, "RunPlaybackLoopAsync failed");
            _isPlaying = false;
        }
    }

    private string FormatSliderTime()
    {
        if (!IsReplay || _replayTimestamp is null) return "LIVE";
        return DtSvc.Format(_replayTimestamp.Value, "HH:mm:ss");
    }

    // ── Top bar helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private RunStatus EffectiveStatus => _details?.Status ?? RunStatus.Unknown;
    private int DoneCount       => _topology?.TotalDone       ?? 0;
    private int InProgressCount => _topology?.TotalInProgress ?? 0;
    private int ProgressPercent => _topology is null ? 0 : (int)Math.Round(_topology.EstimatedProgress * 100);
    private Color ProgressColor => EffectiveStatus switch
    {
        RunStatus.Running => Color.Success,
        RunStatus.Failed  => Color.Error,
        _                   => Color.Default
    };

    private async Task ToggleDetailsStrip()
    {
        _detailsExpanded = !_detailsExpanded;
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("setLocalStorage", DetailsExpandedStorageKey, _detailsExpanded ? "1" : "0"); }
            catch (Exception ex) { Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Failed to persist details-strip state"); }
        }
    }

    private async Task CancelRunAsync()
    {
        if (RunId is null) return;
        var (ok, message) = await RunActions.CancelRunAsync(Environment, RunId);
        if (ok)
        {
            Snackbar.Add(message, Severity.Warning);
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        else
            Snackbar.Add($"Could not cancel run: {message}", Severity.Error);
    }

    private void OpenTimeline()
    {
        if (RunId is null) return;
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateTimeline(RunId, Environment));
    }

    private void OpenKafkaTopicFromGraph(string topic)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(topic)) return;
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateKafkaTopicInspector(topic, Environment));
    }

    private async Task OpenInstanceLogFromGraph((string Service, string Server, int ProcessId, DateTime LastActivity) info)
    {
        var (service, server, processId, lastActivity) = info;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(service) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(server)) return;

        var svc = new ServiceStatus
        {
            ServiceName = service,
            HostName = server,
            ProcessId = processId,
            // The actual day/time THIS instance was active (from its own events), not the
            // run's overall start time — a run can span multiple days, and the log folder
            // is dated by when the instance ran, not when the run began.
            UpdatedDateTime = lastActivity,
        };

        // Deliberately skip DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath here: its cache key is
        // (env, host, service, pid) only — it doesn't include the date — so a cached
        // entry could belong to a completely different day's folder for the same PID
        // (PIDs get reused by the OS over time, and this cache is shared with the live
        // Services page's own discovery). Always do a fresh, date-correct search instead.
        var path = await DiscoverySvc.FindNowAsync(svc, Environment)
            ?? await DiscoverySvc.FindServiceParentFolderAsync(svc, Environment);

        if (path is null)
        {
            Snackbar.Add("Log path not found", Severity.Warning);
            return;
        }

        var tab = TabModel.CreateFilesDashboard(Environment);
        tab.NavigationHint = path;
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
    }

    // ── Errors dialog ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    // Opened from the topbar icon — shows ALL errors, no pre-filter.
    private void OpenErrorsDialog()
    {
        ParseErrorsFilter(string.Empty);
        RebuildFilteredErrors();
        _errorsDialogOpen = true;
    }

    // Opened from a pipeline-row popover's "errors" button — pre-filtered to that
    // (service, pipeline); the user can still widen/narrow via the filter box.
    private void ShowErrorsFromGraph((string Service, string Pipeline) ctx)
    {
        var (service, pipeline) = ctx;
        ParseErrorsFilter($"svc:=\"{service}\" pipe:=\"{pipeline}\"");
        RebuildFilteredErrors();
        _errorsDialogOpen = true;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private void OnErrorsFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        ParseErrorsFilter(text);
        if (_errorsFilterParseError is null) RebuildFilteredErrors();
    }

    private void ParseErrorsFilter(string text)
    {
        _errorsFilterText = text;
        _errorsFilterParseError = null;
        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = ErrorFilterParser.Parse(text, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _errorsFilterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }
        _errorsFilterAst = node;
    }

    private void RebuildFilteredErrors()
    {
        var errors = _eventService?.Events.Values.Where(e => e.IsError) ?? Enumerable.Empty<PerformanceEvent>();
        if (_errorsFilterAst is not null)
            errors = errors.Where(e => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(_errorsFilterAst, e));
        _filteredErrors = errors.OrderByDescending(e => e.Start).ToList();
    }

    // Cache-only lookup (no filesystem search) for the popover's server-name tooltip —
    // deliberately lighter weight than OpenInstanceLogFromGraph's click handler, which
    // does a full fresh search. A cache miss here just means "not discovered yet".
    private string? ResolveLogPathHint(string service, string server, int processId) =>
        DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(
            new ServiceStatus { ServiceName = service, HostName = server, ProcessId = processId },
            Environment);

    // ── Dispose ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        _eventService?.Dispose();
        _topologyTimer?.Dispose();
        _playbackCts?.Cancel();
        _playbackCts?.Dispose();
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.DisposeAsync(); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }

    private static string FormatDuration(TimeSpan ts) =>
        ts.TotalHours >= 1
            ? $"{(int)ts.TotalHours:D2}:{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}"
            : $"{ts.Minutes:D2}:{ts.Seconds:D2}";
}

                     OnOpenKafkaTopic="OpenKafkaTopicFromGraph"

        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Timeline slider (Step 8) ── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-detail-footer">
        <div class="bm-slider-row">
            <MudTooltip Text="@(_isPlaying ? "Pause replay" : IsReplay ? "Resume replay" : "Replay run (up to 30s)")">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@(_isPlaying ? Icons.Material.Filled.Pause : Icons.Material.Filled.PlayArrow)"
                               Size="Size.Small"
                               Class="bm-replay-btn"
                               OnClick="TogglePlayback" />
            </MudTooltip>

            <span class="bm-slider-label bm-muted">@(_sliderMin == default ? "" : DtSvc.Format(_sliderMin, "HH:mm:ss"))</span>

                       Min="0.0" Max="@SliderSteps"
                       Step="1.0"
                       Value="@_sliderValue"
                       ValueChanged="@((double v) => OnSliderChanged(v))"
                       Disabled="@(_sliderMax <= _sliderMin)" />

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@inject IRunService RunService
@inject RunActionsService RunActions
@inject TabService TabService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions<NxtUI.Configuration.RunsSettings> RunsOptions
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@implements IDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill">

    <!-- ── Toolbar: filter + refresh ────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">
        <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Filter runs…"
                   Class="bm-filter-input"
                   FieldHints="@_runFieldHints" />

        <ToolbarRefresh Loading="@_result.IsLoading"
                        OnRefresh="RefreshAsync" />
    </div>

    @if (_result.IsFailed)
    {
        <MudAlert Severity="Severity.Error" Dense="true" Class="bm-data-error ma-2">@_result.Error</MudAlert>
    }

    <!-- Table shell (headers, toolbar, pagination) renders immediately; only
         the rows populate progressively. BmRunsTable shows the shared
         bottom-anchored loading bar (not MudTable's own) so it's consistent
         with every other page. -->
    <BmRunsTable Rows="@_paged"
                 Loading="@_result.IsLoading"
                 TotalCount="@_all.Count"
                 Page="@_page"
                 PageSize="@_pageSize"
                 TotalPages="@_totalPages"
                 PageChanged="OnPageChanged"
                 PageSizeChanged="OnPageSizeChanged"
                 SortField="@_sortField"
                 SortDescending="@_sortDescending"
                 OnSort="OnSort"
                 OnOpenDetail="@(r => OpenDetail(r))"
                 OnOpenTimeline="@(r => OpenTimeline(r))"
                 OnStopRun="@(r => StopRunAsync(r))" />

</div>

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }

    private int _page     = 1;
    private int _pageSize = 25;
    private Result<List<RunSummary>> _result;

    private string      _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string?     _filterParseError = null;
    private FilterNode? _filterAst        = null;

    private static readonly string[] RunSearchableFields = ["RunId", "Description", "Type", "Status"];
    private static readonly FilterParser RunFilterParser   = new(RunSearchableFields);

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _runFieldHints =
    [
        ("run / runid",                 "run identifier"),
        ("requestid / reqid",           "request identifier (int)"),
        ("type",                        "run type"),
        ("status",                      "Running / Completed / Failed"),
        ("start / started",             "start time"),
        ("end / ended / finish",        "end time"),
        ("desc / description",          "description"),
    ];

    private List<RunSummary> _all   = new();
    private List<RunSummary> _paged = new();
    private int _totalPages => Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)_all.Count / _pageSize));

    // Server-side sort — every column click re-queries, same as filter changes.
    private string _sortField      = "StartTime";
    private bool   _sortDescending = true;

    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        ParseFilterText(RunsOptions.Value.DefaultFilterText);
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _result = default; // loading
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            _all = await RunService.GetRunsAsync(
                Environment, DateTime.UtcNow, RunsOptions.Value.MaxResults,
                filter: new RunFilter
                {
                    FilterAst      = _filterAst,
                    SortField      = _sortField,
                    SortDescending = _sortDescending,
                },
                ct: _cts.Token);
            _page = 1;
            RebuildPage();
            _result = Result<List<RunSummary>>.Ok(_all);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _result = Result<List<RunSummary>>.Fail(ex.Message);
        }
    }

    private void ParseFilterText(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _filterParseError = null;

        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = RunFilterParser.Parse(text, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        _filterAst = node;
    }

    // Every filter change re-queries the server — SQL applies the WHERE clause,
    // never a client-side re-filter of an already-fetched page.
    private async Task OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        ParseFilterText(text);
        if (_filterParseError is not null) { StateHasChanged(); return; }
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    // Clicking a column header re-queries the server with the new sort — same
    // principle as filtering: the client never re-orders an already-fetched page.
    private async Task OnSort(string field)
    {
        if (_sortField == field) _sortDescending = !_sortDescending;
        else { _sortField = field; _sortDescending = true; }
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private void RebuildPage() =>
        _paged = _all.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();

    private void OnPageChanged(int page) { _page = page; RebuildPage(); }

    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int size) { _pageSize = size; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private async Task RefreshAsync() => await LoadAsync();

    private void OpenDetail(RunSummary b) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateRunDetail(b.RunId, b.RunId, Environment));

    private void OpenTimeline(RunSummary b) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateTimeline(b.RunId, Environment));

    private async Task StopRunAsync(RunSummary b)
    {
        var (ok, message) = await RunActions.CancelRunAsync(Environment, b.RunId, _cts.Token);
        if (ok)
        {
            Snackbar.Add(message, Severity.Warning);
            await LoadAsync();
        }
        else
            Notifications.Report($"Could not stop run {b.RunId}: {message}", source: "Runs");
    }

    public void Dispose() => _cts.Cancel();
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/RunStatsPage.razor

@inject IRunService RunService
@inject EnvironmentSelectorService EnvService
@inject TabService TabService
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@inject Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions<NxtUI.Configuration.RunsSettings> RunsOptions
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@using NxtUI.Core.Models
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill">

    <!-- ── Toolbar: view toggle, envs, group-by, [color toggle], filter (fills), refresh last ─── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">

        <MudTooltip Text="@(_graphView ? "Table view" : "Graph view")">
            <MudToggleIconButton Toggled="_graphView" ToggledChanged="OnGraphViewToggled"
                                 Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.BarChart"
                                 ToggledIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.TableRows"
                                 Size="Size.Small" />
        </MudTooltip>

        <MudSelect T="string" Label="Environments"
                   SelectedValues="@_selectedEnvs"
                   SelectedValuesChanged="@OnEnvsChanged"
                   MultiSelection="true"
                   Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                   Margin="Margin.Dense"
                   Dense="true"
                   Class="bm-runstats-env-select bm-select-fit bm-tl-select-labeled">

                <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@("Month")">Month</MudSelectItem>
            </MudSelect>

            @if (_groupBy == "None" && _selectedEnvs.Count > 1)
            {
                <MudTooltip Text="Color bars by environment instead of status">
                    <MudToggleIconButton Toggled="_colorByEnv" ToggledChanged="ToggleColorByEnv"
                                         Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Palette"
                                         ToggledIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Palette"
                                         Color="Color.Default" ToggledColor="Color.Primary"
                                         Size="Size.Small" />
                </MudTooltip>
            }
        }

        <FilterBox Value="@_filterText"
                   OnFilterChanged="OnFilterChanged"
                   ParseError="@_filterParseError"
                   Placeholder="Filter runs… (try env:UAT1)"
                   Class="bm-filter-input bm-runstats-filter-fill"
                   FieldHints="@_runFieldHints" />

        <ToolbarRefresh Loading="@_loading" OnRefresh="RefreshAsync" />
    </div>

    {

    }

    {

    }

    {

    }

                     PageSize="@_pageSize"

                     PageSizeChanged="OnPageSizeChanged"
                     ShowActions="false"
                     OnOpenDetail="@(r => OpenDetail(r))" />

@code {
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }

    private List<string> _selectedEnvs = [];
    private bool _graphView = true; // starts in graph mode
    private string _groupBy = "None"; // "None" | "Day" | "Week" | "Month"
    private bool _colorByEnv = false; // only meaningful when _groupBy == "None"

    private bool _loading = true;
    private string? _error;

    private string      _filterText       = string.Empty;
    private string?     _filterParseError = null;
    private FilterNode? _filterAst        = null;

    // "Env" included so "env:UAT1" works — evaluated client-side only (see LoadAsync;
    // RunSummary itself has no Env property, and each server-side fetch is already
    // scoped to one env, so this field can't be pushed down to the per-env query).
    private static readonly string[] RunSearchableFields = ["RunId", "Description", "Type", "Status", "Env"];
    private static readonly FilterParser RunFilterParser   = new(RunSearchableFields);

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _runFieldHints =
    [
        ("run / runid",                 "run identifier"),
        ("requestid / reqid",           "request identifier (int)"),
        ("type",                        "run type"),
        ("status",                      "Running / Completed / Failed"),
        ("start / started",             "start time"),
        ("end / ended / finish",        "end time"),
        ("desc / description",          "description"),
        ("env / environment",           "environment id"),
    ];

    // Flattened shape the client-side filter evaluates against — RunSummary has no Env
    // property, so filtering needs a wrapper that exposes one alongside the same fields
    // FilterEvaluator already knows how to read off RunSummary itself.
    private sealed class FilterableRun
    {
        public string RunId { get; init; } = "";
        public string Description { get; init; } = "";
        public string Type { get; init; } = "";
        public RunStatus Status { get; init; }
        public DateTime StartTime { get; init; }
        public DateTime? EndTime { get; init; }
        public string Env { get; init; } = "";
    }

    private sealed record EnvRun(RunSummary Run, string Env, string EnvColor);
    private List<EnvRun> _allWithEnv = [];
    private List<RunSummary> _all   = [];
    private List<RunSummary> _paged = [];
    private int _page     = 1;
    private int _pageSize = 25;
    private int _totalPages => Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)_all.Count / _pageSize));

    private ElementReference _chartRef;
    private IJSObjectReference? _module;
    private bool _chartReady;
    private bool _chartDirty;

    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        // Default to just the currently selected environment — cross-environment comparison
        // is still one click away via the Environments selector, but opening with everything
        // selected made the initial fetch/graph noisier than most visits need.
        _selectedEnvs = [EnvService.SelectedId];
        ParseFilterText(RunsOptions.Value.RunStatsDefaultFilterText);
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            try { _module = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/run-stats-chart.js?v=5"); }
            catch (Exception ex) { Notifications.Report($"Failed to initialize the run stats chart: {ex.Message}", ex, "Run Stats"); }
        }

        if (_graphView && _module is not null && !_loading)
        {
            if (!_chartReady) { _chartReady = true; await RenderChartAsync(); }
            else if (_chartDirty) { _chartDirty = false; await RenderChartAsync(); }
        }
    }

    private async Task OnGraphViewToggled(bool value)
    {
        // Dispose the outgoing chart instance before its container <div> is removed from
        // the DOM entirely (not just hidden) — switching back later gets a brand-new
        // element, so the old D3 selection would otherwise leak in the JS module's instance map.
        if (!value && _chartReady && _module is not null)
        {
            try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("dispose", _chartRef); } catch { }
            _chartReady = false;
        }

        _graphView = value;
        if (_graphView) _chartDirty = true;
    }

    private async Task OnEnvsChanged(IReadOnlyCollection<string> envs)
    {
        _selectedEnvs = envs.ToList();
        // The toggle is hidden once there's only one env — drop back to status coloring so
        // it doesn't stay silently "on" with no visible control to turn it back off.
        if (_selectedEnvs.Count <= 1) _colorByEnv = false;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private void ParseFilterText(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _filterParseError = null;

        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = RunFilterParser.Parse(text, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        _filterAst = node;
    }

    private async Task OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        ParseFilterText(text);
        if (_filterParseError is not null) { StateHasChanged(); return; }
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        _error = null;
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();

        try
        {
            var envColors = EnvService.Environments.ToDictionary(e => e.Id, e => e.BadgeColor);

            // Fetched unfiltered (just the most-recent-N per env, already sorted) — the
            // filter (including "env:", which no per-env server call can evaluate since
            // RunSummary has no Env property) is applied once, client-side, after merging.
            var perEnv = await Task.WhenAll(_selectedEnvs.Select(async env =>
            {
                var runs = await RunService.GetRunsAsync(
                    env, DateTime.UtcNow, RunsOptions.Value.MaxResults,
                    filter: new RunFilter { SortField = "StartTime", SortDescending = true },
                    ct: _cts.Token);
                return runs.Select(r => new EnvRun(r, env, envColors.GetValueOrDefault(env, "#546E7A")));
            }));

            var merged = perEnv.SelectMany(x => x);
            if (_filterAst is not null)
            {
                merged = merged.Where(x => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(_filterAst, new FilterableRun
                {
                    RunId = x.Run.RunId,
                    Description = x.Run.Description,
                    Type = x.Run.Type,
                    Status = x.Run.Status,
                    StartTime = x.Run.Start,
                    EndTime = x.Run.End,
                    Env = x.Env,
                }));
            }

            _allWithEnv = merged.OrderByDescending(x => x.Run.Start).ToList();
            _all = _allWithEnv.Select(x => x.Run).ToList();
            _page = 1;
            RebuildPage();
            _chartDirty = true;
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _error = ex.Message;
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private void RebuildPage() =>
        _paged = _all.Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();

    private void OnPageChanged(int page) { _page = page; RebuildPage(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int size) { _pageSize = size; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private async Task RefreshAsync() => await LoadAsync();

    private void OpenDetail(RunSummary b)
    {
        var env = _allWithEnv.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Run == b)?.Env ?? _selectedEnvs.FirstOrDefault() ?? "";
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateRunDetail(b.RunId, b.RunId, env));
    }

    private void SetGroupBy(string groupBy)
    {
        if (_groupBy == groupBy) return;
        _groupBy = groupBy;
        _chartDirty = true;
    }

    private void ToggleColorByEnv(bool value)
    {
        _colorByEnv = value;
        _chartDirty = true;
    }

    private async Task RenderChartAsync()
    {
        if (_module is null) return;
        try
        {
            var points = _allWithEnv.Select(x => new
            {
                runId = x.Run.RunId,
                description = x.Run.Description,
                env = x.Env,
                envColor = x.EnvColor,
                day = DtSvc.Format(x.Run.Start, "yyyy-MM-dd"),
                start = x.Run.Start,
                durationSeconds = x.Run.Duration.TotalSeconds,
                status = x.Run.Status.ToString(),
            });
            var options = new { groupBy = _groupBy, colorByEnv = _colorByEnv };
            await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("render", _chartRef, points, options);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to render the run stats chart: {ex.Message}", ex, "Run Stats");
        }
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts.Dispose();
        if (_module is not null)
        {
            try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("dispose", _chartRef); } catch { }
            try { await _module.DisposeAsync(); } catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@using NxtUI.Web.Services
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Core.Configuration
@using Microsoft.Extensions.Options
@using System.Text.RegularExpressions
@inject IOptions<UiSettings> UiOptions
@inject IOptions<ServicesPageSettings> ServicesOptions
@inject IHeartbeatMonitor HeartbeatMonitor
@inject IHeartbeatService HeartbeatSvc
@inject ILogPathDiscoveryService DiscoverySvc
@inject IServiceMetricsMonitor MetricsMonitor
@inject TabService TabService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject ILogger<ServicesPage> Logger
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject IDialogService DialogService
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill">

    <!-- ── Toolbar: filter + view toggle + refresh ──────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar">

        <div class="bm-svc-toolbar-left">
            <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Memory"
                           Size="Size.Small"
                           title="Memory graph"
                           OnClick="OpenMemoryGraph" />

            <MudTooltip Text="@(_graphView ? "Table view" : "Card view")">
                <MudToggleIconButton @bind-Toggled="_graphView"
                                     Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.GridView"
                                     ToggledIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.TableRows"
                                     Size="Size.Small" />
            </MudTooltip>

            @* Grouping only applies to the card view *@
            @if (_graphView)
            {
                <span class="bm-svc-grouping-label">Grouping</span>

                            Loading="@_loading"

    <!-- ── Content ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-table-wrap" @ref="_tableWrapRef">
        @if (_loading)
        {
            <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" Class="bm-loading-bar" />
        }
        @if (_graphView)
        {
            <!-- Card view — grouping supported (pure Blazor, no JS conflict).
                 The container is @key'd by the grouping mode: switching grouping
                 moves cards between *different* parent card-rows, and Blazor's
                 @key only reconciles within one parent — a cross-parent move makes
                 it compute insertBefore against a node whose parent is already
                 detached (null). Re-keying the container forces a full teardown +
                 rebuild on grouping change, so no card is ever diffed across
                 parents. Within a grouping mode the key is stable, so polling
                 updates still diff cards in place by their per-card @key. -->
            <div class="bm-svc-cards" @key="@($"groupmode:{_groupBy}")">
                @foreach (var group in GetGroups(_filtered))
                {
                    <div class="bm-svc-group" @key="@(group.Key ?? "__ungrouped__")">
                        @if (group.Key != null)
                        {
                            <div class="bm-svc-group-header">
                                <span class="bm-svc-group-count">@group.Count()</span>
                                @group.Key
                                @{ var groupMem = group.Sum(s => s.RamMb ?? 0); }
                                @if (groupMem > 0)
                                {
                                    <span class="bm-svc-group-ram">@FormatMb(groupMem) MB</span>
                                    @if (_groupBy == "HostName")
                                    {
                                        <span class="bm-svc-group-ram">avg @FormatMb(AverageMb(group)) MB</span>
                                    }
                                }
                            </div>
                        }
                        <div class="bm-svc-card-row">
                            @foreach (var s in group)
                            {
                                var cardKey      = ServiceKey(s);
                                var cardPath     = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(s, Env);
                                var cardSearching = DiscoverySvc.IsSearching(s, Env);
                                var spark = BuildSparkData(s, cardKey);
                                <div @key="@cardKey"
                                     class="@($"bm-svc-card {(s.IsOnline ? "bm-svc-online" : "bm-svc-offline")} {(cardSearching ? "bm-svc-searching" : "")}")"
                                     @ondblclick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(s))"
                                     @onclick="@(async (MouseEventArgs e) => { if (e.CtrlKey) await CopyPathAsync(s); })">
                                    @if (spark is not null)
                                    {
                                        @spark.Svg
                                    }
                                    <div class="bm-svc-card-header">
                                        <span class="bm-svc-card-name" title="@s.ServiceName">@StripName(s.ServiceName)</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="bm-svc-card-host">@s.HostName</div>
                                    <div class="bm-svc-card-meta">
                                        <span>PID @s.ProcessId</span>
                                        @if (s.RamMb is not null || s.PeakMb is not null)
                                        {
                                            <span>Mem. <span style="@($"font-weight:700;{MemColorStyle(s.RamMb)}")">@FormatMb(s.RamMb)</span><span class="bm-muted bm-svc-peak-label" style="margin-left:5px">@FormatMb(s.PeakMb)</span></span>
                                        }
                                        <span>@FormatAge(s.UpdatedDateTime)</span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <!-- Table view — usual style, sortable, paginated (no grouping) -->
            <MudTable T="ServiceStatus"
                      Items="@_paged"
                      Dense="true"
                      Hover="true"
                      Elevation="0"
                      Striped="true"
                      Class="bm-batch-table"
                      FixedHeader="true"
                      Height="100%"
                      RowClassFunc="@((svc, _) => DiscoverySvc.IsSearching(svc, Env) ? "bm-row-searching" : string.Empty)">
                <HeaderContent>
                    <MudTh Style="width:36px;"></MudTh>
                    <MudTh @onclick='@(() => SetSort("name"))' Style="cursor:pointer">Service@(SortIcon("name"))</MudTh>
                    <MudTh @onclick='@(() => SetSort("host"))' Style="cursor:pointer">Host@(SortIcon("host"))</MudTh>
                    <MudTh @onclick='@(() => SetSort("pid"))' Style="cursor:pointer">PID@(SortIcon("pid"))</MudTh>
                    <MudTh @onclick='@(() => SetSort("updated"))' Style="cursor:pointer">Last Heartbeat@(SortIcon("updated"))</MudTh>
                    <MudTh @onclick='@(() => SetSort("started"))' Style="cursor:pointer">Started (UTC)@(SortIcon("started"))</MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="text-align:right; cursor:pointer;" @onclick='@(() => SetSort("mem"))'>Mem (MB)@(SortIcon("mem"))</MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="text-align:right; cursor:pointer;" @onclick='@(() => SetSort("peak"))'>Peak (MB)@(SortIcon("peak"))</MudTh>
                    <MudTh Style="width:80px; text-align:center;">Actions</MudTh>
                </HeaderContent>
                <RowTemplate>
                    @{
                        var rowKey  = ServiceKey(context);
                        var rowPath = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(context, Env);
                        var dbl     = EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, () => OpenLogViewerAsync(context));
                    }
                    <MudTd Style="padding-left:12px;" @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <MudIcon Icon="@(context.IsOnline ? Icons.Material.Filled.Circle : Icons.Material.Outlined.Circle)"
                                 Size="Size.Small"
                                 Color="@(context.IsOnline ? Color.Success : Color.Error)" />
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Service" @ondblclick="dbl"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2">@context.ServiceName</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Host" @ondblclick="dbl"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@context.HostName</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="PID" @ondblclick="dbl"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@context.ProcessId</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Last Heartbeat" data-value="@DtSvc.Format(context.UpdatedDateTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")" @ondblclick="dbl"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2">@FormatAge(context.UpdatedDateTime)</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Started" @ondblclick="dbl"><MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@DtSvc.Format(context.CreatedDateTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")</MudText></MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Mem (MB)" Style="text-align:right;" data-value="@(context.RamMb?.ToString("F2") ?? "")" @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace" Style="@MemColorStyle(context.RamMb)">@FormatMb(context.RamMb)</MudText>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd DataLabel="Peak (MB)" Style="text-align:right;" data-value="@(context.PeakMb?.ToString("F2") ?? "")" @ondblclick="dbl">
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-monospace bm-muted">@FormatMb(context.PeakMb)</MudText>
                    </MudTd>
                    <MudTd Style="text-align:center;">
                        <div class="bm-row-actions">
                            <MudTooltip Text="@(rowPath != null ? $"Copy: {rowPath}" : "Copy log path")">
                                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.ContentCopy"
                                               Size="Size.Small"
                                               Color="@(rowPath != null ? Color.Default : Color.Inherit)"
                                               Disabled="@_copyingFor.Contains(rowKey)"
                                               OnClick="@(() => CopyPathAsync(context))" />
                            </MudTooltip>
                            <MudTooltip Text="Open log viewer">
                                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Article"
                                               Size="Size.Small"
                                               Color="@(rowPath != null ? Color.Default : Color.Inherit)"
                                               Disabled="@_openingLogFor.Contains(rowKey)"
                                               OnClick="@(() => OpenLogViewerAsync(context))" />
                            </MudTooltip>
                        </div>
                    </MudTd>
                </RowTemplate>
