        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Footer: count + pagination (table view) ───────────────────── -->
    <div class="bm-batch-footer">
        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted bm-footer-count">
            @_filtered.Count results
        </MudText>

        @if (!_graphView)
        {
            <BmPagination Count="@_totalPages"
                          Selected="@_page"
                          SelectedChanged="OnPageChanged" />

            <div class="bm-rows-select">
                <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted" Style="white-space:nowrap;">Rows:</MudText>
                <MudSelect T="int"
                           Value="@_pageSize"
                           ValueChanged="OnPageSizeChanged"
                           Dense="true"
                           Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                           Margin="Margin.Dense"
                           Style="width:90px">
                    <MudSelectItem Value="10">10</MudSelectItem>
                    <MudSelectItem Value="25">25</MudSelectItem>
                    <MudSelectItem Value="50">50</MudSelectItem>
                    <MudSelectItem Value="100">100</MudSelectItem>
                    <MudSelectItem Value="200">200</MudSelectItem>
                </MudSelect>
            </div>
        }
    </div>

</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Env { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool IsFocused { get; set; }

    // Focus-gating: a background Services tab must not run its own Mongo refresh or
    // re-render on every heartbeat/metrics tick — that heavy work runs on the shared
    // Blazor circuit thread and stalls whatever page the user is actually viewing.
    private bool _previousIsFocused;
    private bool _initialized;

    // Card-view service-name shortener (display only, cards only — see UiSettings.LabelStripWords).
    private Func<string, string>? _stripFormatter;
    private string StripName(string name) => _stripFormatter?.Invoke(name) ?? name;

    private int  _page     = 1;
    private int  _pageSize = 25;
    private bool _loading  = false;
    private string  _filterText       = "";
    private string? _filterParseError = null;
    private string  _groupBy          = "HostName";
    private bool    _graphView        = true;
    private DateTime? _lastUpdated;

    private static readonly string[] SearchableFields = ["ServiceName", "HostName", "ProcessId"];
    private static readonly FilterParser SvcFilterParser = new(
        searchableFields: SearchableFields,
        aliases: new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        {
            ["svc"]         = "ServiceName",
            ["name"]        = "ServiceName",
            ["svcname"]     = "ServiceName",
            ["servicename"] = "ServiceName",
            ["host"]        = "HostName",
            ["hostname"]    = "HostName",
            ["pid"]         = "ProcessId",
            ["processid"]   = "ProcessId",
            ["mem"]         = "RamMb",
            ["peak"]        = "PeakMb",
            ["updated"]     = "UpdatedDateTime",
            ["update"]      = "UpdatedDateTime",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _fieldHints =
    [
        ("svc / name",  "service name"),
        ("host",        "host name"),
        ("pid",         "process ID"),
        ("mem",         "current memory in MB (e.g. mem:>500)"),
        ("peak",        "peak memory in MB (e.g. peak:>1000)"),
        ("updated",     "last heartbeat timestamp (e.g. updated:>-10m  →  online in last 10 min)"),
    ];

    private List<ServiceStatus> _all      = new();
    private List<ServiceStatus> _filtered = new();
    private List<ServiceStatus> _paged    = new();
    private int _totalPages => Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)_filtered.Count / _pageSize));
    private string _sortField = "mem";
    private bool   _sortDesc  = true;

    // Keys currently awaiting a path search triggered by the copy/open actions
    private readonly HashSet<string> _copyingFor    = new();
    private readonly HashSet<string> _openingLogFor = new();

    // Coalesce path-resolved notifications: discovery can resolve many services in
    // a burst (e.g. on first load), and one StateHasChanged per resolution renders
    // the grid several times while the previous batch is still being applied on the
    // client — that render storm corrupts the DOM diff (insertBefore on null parent).
    private readonly object _renderGate = new();
    private bool _renderScheduled;
    private bool _disposed;

    // Scroll-position preservation across background-poll re-renders (see bmScrollKeep):
    // a metrics tick refreshes the table content, and without this the fixed-header
    // scroll container would jump back to the top on every update.
    private ElementReference _tableWrapRef;
    private bool             _restoreScroll;

    // Held for the lifetime of this tab; disposing it tells the monitor this env
    // has one fewer subscriber (monitoring stops when the last tab for env closes).
    private IDisposable? _metricsSubscription;
    private CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        _stripFormatter    = TopologyLabelFormatter.Build(UiOptions.Value.LabelStripWords, Env);
        _filterText        = ServicesOptions.Value.DefaultFilterText;

        DiscoverySvc.OnPathResolved        += OnPathResolved;
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated    += OnMetricsUpdated;
        HeartbeatMonitor.OnServicesUpdated += OnServicesUpdated;
        _metricsSubscription = MetricsMonitor.Subscribe(Env);

        _loading = true;
        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        await LoadFromMongoAsync();
        _initialized = true;
    }

    // Refresh once when the user switches back to this tab (data may be stale because
    // background ticks were skipped while it wasn't focused).
    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;
        var gained = IsFocused && !_previousIsFocused;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        if (gained && _initialized)
            _ = InvokeAsync(LoadFromMongoAsync);
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (_restoreScroll)
        {
            _restoreScroll = false;
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmScrollKeep.restore", _tableWrapRef); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }

    private async Task LoadFromMongoAsync()
    {
        _cts.Cancel();
        _cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var ct = _cts.Token;

        _loading = true;
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);

        try
        {
            var since   = ExtractSince(_filterText);
            var results = await HeartbeatSvc.GetServiceStatusesAsync(Env, since, ct);
            _all         = results;
            _lastUpdated = DateTime.UtcNow;
            foreach (var svc in _all)
            {
                DiscoverySvc.EnsureDiscovering(svc, Env);
            }
            RecomputeFilter();
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { return; }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Failed to load services for env {Env}", Env);
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load services: {ex.Message}", ex, "Services");
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
        }

        await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    // Extracts the earliest "since" cutoff from updated:>-X filter terms.
    // Returns null if no updated constraint is found (caller uses the config default).
    private static readonly Regex _sinceRegex =
        new(@"updated:>-(\d+)([smhdw])", RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled);

    private static DateTime? ExtractSince(string filter)
    {
        DateTime? earliest = null;
        foreach (Match m in _sinceRegex.Matches(filter))
        {
            var amount = int.Parse(m.Groups[1].Value);
            var since  = m.Groups[2].Value.ToLowerInvariant() switch
            {
                "s" => DateTime.UtcNow.AddSeconds(-amount),
                "m" => DateTime.UtcNow.AddMinutes(-amount),
                "h" => DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(-amount),
                "d" => DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-amount),
                "w" => DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-amount * 7),
                _   => (DateTime?)null,
            };
            if (since is not null && (earliest is null || since < earliest))
            {
                earliest = since;
            }
        }
        return earliest;
    }

    // HeartbeatMonitor fires this when it completes its own poll — use it as a
    // timing signal to refresh the page's own MongoDB query.
    private void OnServicesUpdated(string env)
    {
        // Skip the Mongo refresh entirely when this tab isn't on screen — it'll refresh
        // on focus-gain (OnParametersSet). Background refreshes are what froze the UI of
        // whatever page the user was actually looking at.
        if (env != Env || !IsFocused) return;
        _ = LoadFromMongoAsync();
    }

    // ── Path discovery ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnPathResolved(string key) => ScheduleRender();

    // Only react to updates for this tab's environment.
    private void OnMetricsUpdated(string env)
    {
        if (env == Env) ScheduleRender();
    }

    private void ScheduleRender()
    {
        // No re-render work while this tab is in the background (see OnServicesUpdated).
        if (!IsFocused) return;

        // Debounce: collapse a burst of notifications into a single re-render.
        lock (_renderGate)
        {
            if (_renderScheduled || _disposed) return;
            _renderScheduled = true;
        }
        _ = DebouncedRenderAsync();
    }

    private async Task DebouncedRenderAsync()
    {
        try
        {
            await Task.Delay(400);
            lock (_renderGate) { _renderScheduled = false; }
            if (!_disposed)
                await InvokeAsync(async () =>
                {
                    // Capture scroll before the refresh so restoring it in OnAfterRenderAsync
                    // keeps the user exactly where they were (imperceptible background update).
                    try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmScrollKeep.save", _tableWrapRef); }
                    catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }

                    // Re-stamp + re-filter so RAM/Peak columns and any ram/peak
                    // filter react to new samples; keep the user's current page.
                    RecomputeFilter(resetPage: false);
                    _restoreScroll = true;
                    StateHasChanged();
                });
        }
        catch (ObjectDisposedException)   { }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException)   { }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "DebouncedRenderAsync failed for env {Env}", Env);
        }
    }

    private async Task CopyPathAsync(ServiceStatus svc)
    {
        var key = ServiceKey(svc);
        if (_copyingFor.Contains(key)) return;

        var path = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(svc, Env);

        if (path is null)
        {
            // Either still searching or not yet found — trigger immediate search
            _copyingFor.Add(key);
            StateHasChanged();
            try   { path = await DiscoverySvc.FindNowAsync(svc, Env); }
            finally
            {
                _copyingFor.Remove(key);
                StateHasChanged();
            }
        }

        if (path is null)
        {
            Snackbar.Add("Log path not found", Severity.Warning);
            return;
        }

        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", path, "Path copied to clipboard");
    }

    private async Task OpenLogViewerAsync(ServiceStatus svc)
    {
        var key  = ServiceKey(svc);
        if (_openingLogFor.Contains(key)) return;

        var path = DiscoverySvc.GetCachedPath(svc, Env);

        if (path is null)
        {
            _openingLogFor.Add(key);
            StateHasChanged();
            try   { path = await DiscoverySvc.FindNowAsync(svc, Env); }
            finally
            {
                _openingLogFor.Remove(key);
                StateHasChanged();
            }
        }

        if (path is null)
        {
            Snackbar.Add("Log path not found", Severity.Warning);
            return;
        }

        var tab = TabModel.CreateFilesDashboard(Env);
        tab.NavigationHint = path;
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
    }

    private string ServiceKey(ServiceStatus s) =>
        LogPathDiscoveryService.CacheKey(s, Env);

    // ── Filter / pagination ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _filterText = text;
        _ = LoadFromMongoAsync();
    }

    // Pure computation, no render — callable from the poll path without forcing
    // an off-context StateHasChanged. LoadAsync renders via InvokeAsync instead.
    // resetPage=false keeps the current page (used by metrics-driven refreshes so
    // a 90s update doesn't yank the user back to page 1).
    private void RecomputeFilter(bool resetPage = true)
    {
        StampMetrics();

        _filterParseError = null;

        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_filterText))
        {
            try   { node = SvcFilterParser.Parse(_filterText, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _filterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }

        _filtered = node is null
            ? _all
            : _all.Where(s => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(node, s)).ToList();

        _page = resetPage ? 1 : Math.Clamp(_page, 1, _totalPages);
        RebuildPage();
    }

    // Stamp the latest metrics (in MB) onto each row so display, sort and filter
    // all read the same value. Null when no sample has been parsed yet.
    private void StampMetrics()
    {
        foreach (var s in _all)
        {
            var m = MetricsMonitor.GetLatest(Env, s);
            s.RamMb  = m is null ? null : m.TotalCurrentBytes / (1024d * 1024d);
            s.PeakMb = m is null ? null : m.TotalPeakBytes    / (1024d * 1024d);
        }
    }

    private void SetSort(string field)
    {
        if (_sortField == field) _sortDesc = !_sortDesc;
        else { _sortField = field; _sortDesc = false; }
        _page = 1;
        RebuildPage();
    }

    private string SortIcon(string field) =>
        _sortField != field ? "" : _sortDesc ? " ▼" : " ▲";

    private IEnumerable<ServiceStatus> ApplySort(IEnumerable<ServiceStatus> src) => _sortField switch
    {
        "name"    => _sortDesc ? src.OrderByDescending(s => s.ServiceName)    : src.OrderBy(s => s.ServiceName),
        "host"    => _sortDesc ? src.OrderByDescending(s => s.HostName)        : src.OrderBy(s => s.HostName),
        "pid"     => _sortDesc ? src.OrderByDescending(s => s.ProcessId)       : src.OrderBy(s => s.ProcessId),
        "updated" => _sortDesc ? src.OrderByDescending(s => s.UpdatedDateTime) : src.OrderBy(s => s.UpdatedDateTime),
        "started" => _sortDesc ? src.OrderByDescending(s => s.CreatedDateTime) : src.OrderBy(s => s.CreatedDateTime),
        "mem"     => _sortDesc ? src.OrderByDescending(s => s.RamMb  ?? 0)     : src.OrderBy(s => s.RamMb  ?? 0),
        "peak"    => _sortDesc ? src.OrderByDescending(s => s.PeakMb ?? 0)     : src.OrderBy(s => s.PeakMb ?? 0),
        _         => src,
    };

    private void RebuildPage() =>
        _paged = ApplySort(_filtered).Skip((_page - 1) * _pageSize).Take(_pageSize).ToList();

    private void OnPageChanged(int page)  { _page = page; RebuildPage(); }
    private void OnPageSizeChanged(int s) { _pageSize = s; _page = 1; RebuildPage(); }

    private void OpenMemoryGraph() =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateMemoryGraph(Env));

    private async Task OpenRestartDialogAsync()
    {
        var parameters = new DialogParameters<BulkActionDialog>
        {
            { x => x.ActionVerb,     "Restart" },
            { x => x.ItemLabel,      "service" },
            { x => x.LoadItemsAsync, () => Task.FromResult(_all.Select(s => s.ServiceName).Distinct().ToList()) },
        };
        await DialogService.ShowAsync<BulkActionDialog>("Restart services", parameters,
            new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true, CloseButton = true });
    }

    private void OnGroupByChanged(string value) => _groupBy = value;

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        await LoadFromMongoAsync();
    }

    // Cards are always ordered Host -> Service -> PID within (and across, when grouped)
    // regardless of the current grouping mode, so switching grouping never reshuffles
    // cards you've already found within a host/service.
    private static IEnumerable<ServiceStatus> OrderForCards(IEnumerable<ServiceStatus> rows) =>
        rows.OrderBy(s => s.HostName, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(s => s.ServiceName, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ThenBy(s => s.ProcessId);

    private IEnumerable<IGrouping<string?, ServiceStatus>> GetGroups(List<ServiceStatus> rows)
    {
        var ordered = OrderForCards(rows);
        return _groupBy switch
        {
            "ServiceName" => ordered.GroupBy(s => (string?)s.ServiceName)
                                     .OrderBy(g => g.Key, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase),
            "HostName"    => ordered.GroupBy(s => (string?)s.HostName)
                                     .OrderBy(g => g.Key, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase),
            _             => ordered.GroupBy(_ => (string?)null),
        };
    }

    private static double AverageMb(IGrouping<string?, ServiceStatus> group)
    {
        var values = group.Select(s => s.RamMb ?? 0).ToList();
        return values.Count > 0 ? values.Average() : 0;
    }

    private static string FormatAge(DateTime updatedUtc)
    {
        var age = DateTime.UtcNow - updatedUtc;
        if (age.TotalSeconds < 60)  return $"{(int)age.TotalSeconds}s ago";
        if (age.TotalMinutes < 60)  return $"{(int)age.TotalMinutes}m ago";
        return updatedUtc.ToLocalTime().ToString("HH:mm:ss");
    }

    private record SparkData(MarkupString Svg);

    private SparkData? BuildSparkData(ServiceStatus s, string cardKey)
    {
        var history = MetricsMonitor.GetHistory(Env, s);
        if (history.Count < 2) return null;

        var cutoff = DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(-6);
        // Sorted defensively — the path below draws a straight line between consecutive
        // points assuming ascending timestamps; an out-of-order point draws a backward
        // jump instead (visually: a triangular hole cut into the filled area).
        var window = history.Where(m => m.Timestamp >= cutoff).OrderBy(m => m.Timestamp).ToList();
        if (window.Count < 2) return null;

        var tMin  = window[0].Timestamp;
        var tMax  = window[^1].Timestamp;
        var tSpan = (tMax - tMin).Ticks;
        if (tSpan == 0) return null;

        var vMax = window.Max(m => m.TotalCurrentBytes);
        if (vMax == 0) return null;

        const int W = 100, H = 40;

        // Area path
        var path = new System.Text.StringBuilder("M0,40");
        foreach (var m in window)
        {
            var x = (m.Timestamp - tMin).Ticks / (double)tSpan * W;
            var y = H - (double)m.TotalCurrentBytes / vMax * H;
            path.Append(System.FormattableString.Invariant($" L{x:F1},{y:F1}"));
        }
        path.Append(" L100,40 Z");

        // Hour-boundary X positions
        var firstHour = new DateTime(tMin.Year, tMin.Month, tMin.Day, tMin.Hour, 0, 0, DateTimeKind.Utc).AddHours(1);
        var lines     = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
        for (var h = firstHour; h < tMax; h = h.AddHours(1))
        {
            var hx = (h - tMin).Ticks / (double)tSpan * W;
            lines.Append(System.FormattableString.Invariant(
                $"<line x1=\"{hx:F1}\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"{hx:F1}\" y2=\"40\" stroke=\"rgba(30,100,200,0.20)\" stroke-width=\"1\" vector-effect=\"non-scaling-stroke\"/>"));
        }

        // Tooltip JSON [[unixSec, ramMb, peakMb], ...] — no quotes, safe in HTML attribute
        var json = new System.Text.StringBuilder("[");
        for (int i = 0; i < window.Count; i++)
        {
            if (i > 0) json.Append(',');
            var sec    = new DateTimeOffset(window[i].Timestamp, TimeSpan.Zero).ToUnixTimeSeconds();
            var ramMb  = window[i].TotalCurrentBytes / (1024.0 * 1024.0);
            var peakMb = window[i].TotalPeakBytes    / (1024.0 * 1024.0);
            json.Append(System.FormattableString.Invariant($"[{sec},{ramMb:F1},{peakMb:F1}]"));
        }
        json.Append(']');

        var gradId  = $"sg{(uint)cardKey.GetHashCode():x8}";
        var tooltip = System.Web.HttpUtility.HtmlAttributeEncode(json.ToString());
        var svg = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
        svg.Append($"<svg class=\"bm-svc-spark\" viewBox=\"0 0 100 40\" preserveAspectRatio=\"none\" data-spark=\"{tooltip}\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">");
        svg.Append($"<defs><linearGradient id=\"{gradId}\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">");
        svg.Append("<stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"var(--mud-palette-primary)\" stop-opacity=\"0.40\"/>");
        svg.Append("<stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"var(--mud-palette-primary)\" stop-opacity=\"0.04\"/>");
        svg.Append("</linearGradient></defs>");
        svg.Append(lines);
        svg.Append($"<path d=\"{path}\" fill=\"url(#{gradId})\"/>");
        // Add a visible stroke line on top of the fill area
        var strokePath = path.ToString();
        var firstL = strokePath.IndexOf(" L", StringComparison.Ordinal);
        if (firstL >= 0)
        {
            var open = strokePath[firstL..];
            var closingL = open.LastIndexOf(" L100,40", StringComparison.Ordinal);
            if (closingL >= 0) open = open[..closingL];
            svg.Append(System.FormattableString.Invariant(
                $"<path d=\"M{open.TrimStart()}\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"var(--mud-palette-primary)\" stroke-width=\"1.2\" stroke-opacity=\"0.60\" vector-effect=\"non-scaling-stroke\"/>"));
        }
        svg.Append("</svg>");
        return new SparkData(new MarkupString(svg.ToString()));
    }

    // Whole megabytes with thousands separator using the client's locale; "—" until a sample arrives.
    private static string FormatMb(double? mb) =>
        mb is null or <= 0 ? "—" : mb.Value.ToString("N0");

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        lock (_renderGate) { _disposed = true; }
        _cts.Cancel();
        DiscoverySvc.OnPathResolved        -= OnPathResolved;
        MetricsMonitor.OnMetricsUpdated    -= OnMetricsUpdated;
        HeartbeatMonitor.OnServicesUpdated -= OnServicesUpdated;
        _metricsSubscription?.Dispose();
        await Task.CompletedTask;
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/ServicesPage.razor.cs
LENGTH 1922
namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages;

public partial class ServicesPage
{
    // Same blue → green → yellow → orange → red → deeppink gradient as the Home
    // memory treemap (d3-home-treemap.js ramColor()) — kept in sync by hand,
    // same tradeoff noted in docs/10_CodeReviewNotes.md for the log-format parsers.
    private static readonly (double Mb, byte R, byte G, byte B)[] MemGradientStops =
    [
        (0,    59, 130, 246), // blue      #3B82F6
        (128,  34, 197, 94),  // green     #22C55E
        (512,  234, 179, 8),  // yellow    #EAB308
        (2048, 249, 115, 22), // orange    #F97316
        (4096, 239, 68, 68),  // red       #EF4444
        (8196, 255, 20, 147), // deeppink  #FF1493
    ];

    private static string? MemGradientColor(double? mb)
    {
        if (mb is null || mb <= 0) return null;
        var stops = MemGradientStops;
        var v = mb.Value;

        if (v <= stops[0].Mb) return Rgb(stops[0]);
        var last = stops[^1];
        if (v >= last.Mb) return Rgb(last);

        for (var i = 0; i < stops.Length - 1; i++)
        {
            var s0 = stops[i];
            var s1 = stops[i + 1];
            if (v < s0.Mb || v > s1.Mb) continue;

            var t = (v - s0.Mb) / (s1.Mb - s0.Mb);
            var r = (byte)Math.Round(s0.R + (s1.R - s0.R) * t);
            var g = (byte)Math.Round(s0.G + (s1.G - s0.G) * t);
            var b = (byte)Math.Round(s0.B + (s1.B - s0.B) * t);
            return $"rgb({r},{g},{b})";
        }
        return Rgb(last);
    }

    private static string Rgb((double Mb, byte R, byte G, byte B) s) => $"rgb({s.R},{s.G},{s.B})";

    /// <summary>Inline color style for a Mem value — empty string (default text color) when there's no sample yet.</summary>
    private static string MemColorStyle(double? mb)
    {
        var color = MemGradientColor(mb);
        return color is null ? "" : $"color:{color};";
    }
}

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@implements IAsyncDisposable
@inject ThemeService ThemeService
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@using Microsoft.JSInterop
@using System.Reflection

<div class="bm-settings-page">

    <MudText Typo="Typo.h6" Class="mb-4" Style="font-weight:600;">
        <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Settings" Class="mr-2" Size="Size.Small" />
        Settings
    </MudText>

    <MudGrid Spacing="4">

        <MudItem xs="12" md="6">
            <MudPaper Elevation="0" Class="bm-settings-section">
                <MudText Typo="Typo.subtitle2" Class="bm-section-title mb-4">Appearance</MudText>
                <div class="bm-settings-row">
                    <div>
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body1">Theme</MudText>
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Class="bm-muted">
                            Choose dark, light, or follow your OS setting
                        </MudText>
                    </div>
                    <MudButtonGroup Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Class="bm-theme-switcher">
                        <MudButton StartIcon="@(_mode == ThemeMode.Dark ? Icons.Material.Filled.DarkMode : Icons.Material.Outlined.DarkMode)"

                        <MudButton StartIcon="@(DtSvc.UseUtc ? Icons.Material.Filled.Public : Icons.Material.Outlined.Public)"

                                   OnClick="@(() => SetTz(true))">UTC</MudButton>
                    </MudButtonGroup>

        </MudItem>

        <MudItem xs="12" md="6">

                            Show Batches, Pipelines, and Config in the sidebar

                    <MudButtonGroup Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined" Class="bm-theme-switcher">
                        <MudButton StartIcon="@(!DtSvc.DevMode ? Icons.Material.Filled.CodeOff : Icons.Material.Outlined.CodeOff)"
                                   Class="@(!DtSvc.DevMode ? "bm-view-btn-active" : "bm-view-btn-inactive")"

                        <MudButton StartIcon="@(DtSvc.DevMode ? Icons.Material.Filled.Code : Icons.Material.Outlined.Code)"

                                   OnClick="@(() => SetDevMode(true))">On</MudButton>

        <MudItem xs="12" md="6">

                               Size="Size.Small"

                                                   Size="Size.Small"

@code {
    private static readonly string AppVersion = GetVersion(typeof(Program).Assembly);
    private static readonly string MudBlazorVersion = GetVersion(typeof(MudBlazor.MudButton).Assembly);
    private static readonly string FrameworkDescription = System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeInformation.FrameworkDescription;

    private static string GetVersion(Assembly asm)
    {
        var info = asm.GetCustomAttribute<AssemblyInformationalVersionAttribute>()?.InformationalVersion;
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(info))
        {
            var plus = info.IndexOf('+'); // strip source-revision suffix (e.g. "9.6.0+abcdef1234")
            return plus >= 0 ? info[..plus] : info;
        }
        return asm.GetName().Version?.ToString() ?? "unknown";
    }

    private ThemeMode _mode;
    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;
    private List<ErrorNotificationEntry> _errors = [];
    private readonly HashSet<ErrorNotificationEntry> _expanded = [];

    private void ToggleExpanded(ErrorNotificationEntry entry)
    {
        if (!_expanded.Remove(entry)) _expanded.Add(entry);
    }

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        _mode = ThemeService.Mode;
        ThemeService.OnChange += OnThemeExternallyChanged;

        _errors = Notifications.History.OrderByDescending(e => e.TimestampUtc).ToList();
        Notifications.OnError += OnErrorReported;
    }

    private void OnErrorReported(ErrorNotificationEntry entry) => InvokeAsync(() =>
    {
        _errors.Insert(0, entry);
        StateHasChanged();
    });

    private void ClearErrors()
    {
        Notifications.Clear();
        _errors = [];
    }

    private static string FormatError(ErrorNotificationEntry e) =>
        $"[{e.TimestampUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}Z] {e.Source ?? "—"}: {e.Message}"
        + (string.IsNullOrEmpty(e.Detail) ? "" : $"\n{e.Detail}");

    private async Task CopyErrorAsync(ErrorNotificationEntry entry) =>
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", FormatError(entry), "Error copied to clipboard");

    private async Task CopyAllErrorsAsync() =>
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText",
            string.Join("\n\n", _errors.Select(FormatError)), "All errors copied to clipboard");

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
            _appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=7");
    }

    private void SetMode(ThemeMode mode)
    {
        _mode = mode;
        ThemeService.Mode = mode;
        var cookie = mode switch
        {
            ThemeMode.Light  => "light",
            ThemeMode.System => "system",
            _                => "dark",
        };
        _ = _appModule?.InvokeVoidAsync("saveTheme", cookie);
    }

    private void SetTz(bool useUtc)
    {
        DtSvc.UseUtc = useUtc;
        _ = _appModule?.InvokeVoidAsync("saveTz", useUtc ? "utc" : "local");
    }

    private void SetDevMode(bool enabled)
    {
        DtSvc.DevMode = enabled;
        _ = _appModule?.InvokeVoidAsync("saveDevMode", enabled);
    }

    private void OnThemeExternallyChanged()
    {
        _mode = ThemeService.Mode;
        InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
    }

    public ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        // Synchronous — event unsubscribe, no I/O.
        ThemeService.OnChange -= OnThemeExternallyChanged;
        Notifications.OnError -= OnErrorReported;

        // Fire-and-forget: releasing the JS module reference for a page being torn down.
        if (_appModule is not null)
            _ = SafeDisposeModuleAsync(_appModule);
        return ValueTask.CompletedTask;
    }

    private static async Task SafeDisposeModuleAsync(IJSObjectReference module)
    {
        try { await module.DisposeAsync(); }
        catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/TimelineTab.razor
LENGTH 36520
@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages
@using NxtUI.Web.Models
@using NxtUI.Core.Filtering
@inject IRunService RunService
@inject RunEventBroker RunEvents
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject TabService TabService
@inject NxtUI.Web.Services.EnvironmentSelectorService EnvService
@inject Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions<NxtUI.Configuration.RunsSettings> RunsOptions
@inject Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions<NxtUI.Core.Configuration.TimelineSettings> TimelineOptions
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@inject ILogger<NxtUI.Web.Services.TimelineRun> TimelineRunLogger
@inject ILogger<TimelineTab> Logger
@implements IAsyncDisposable

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? InitialRunId { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool IsFocused { get; set; }

    // ── Batch data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private readonly List<TimelineRun> _runs = new();
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _runLock = new(1, 1);

    // Total events across every currently loaded run — shown in the control bar.
    // TimelineRun.EventCount avoids the OrderBy/ToList sort-and-copy that reading
    // .Events.Count would otherwise trigger on every render (see TimelineRun.cs).
    private int TotalEventCount => _runs.Sum(r => r.EventCount);

    // ── Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private string _filterText = string.Empty;

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _timelineFieldHints =
    [
        ("svc / service",   "service name"),
        ("pipe / pipeline", "pipeline name"),
        ("src / source",    "source identifier"),
        ("chunk / chunkid / name", "chunk name"),
        ("srv / server",    "server / host"),
        ("pid / processId", "process ID"),
        ("dur / duration",  "event duration  (hh:mm or hh:mm:ss)"),
        ("start",           "event start time (UTC)"),
        ("finish",          "event finish time (UTC)"),
    ];

    // ── Control bar state ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private GroupByOption _groupBy = GroupByOption.ServicePipeline;
    private ColourByOption _colourBy = ColourByOption.Source;
    private bool _stackView   = false;
    private bool _showTooltip = true;

    // ── Shortcuts dialog ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private bool _shortcutsOpen = false;

    // ── Add Run dialog ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private bool _addDialogOpen = false;
    private List<RunSummary> _dialogAll = new();
    private List<RunSummary> _dialogBatches = new();
    private RunSummary? _dialogSelected;
    private string _dialogEnv = string.Empty;
    private bool _dialogLoading = false;
    private int _dialogPage = 1;
    private int _dialogPageSize = 25;
    private int _dialogTotalPages => Math.Max(1, (int)Math.Ceiling((double)_dialogAll.Count / _dialogPageSize));

    // Default filter: last 10 days — same default/rationale as the Runs page (the query
    // always runs server-side, so this is the first WHERE clause SQL sees).
    private const string DefaultDialogFilterText = "start:>=-10d";

    private string      _dialogFilterText       = DefaultDialogFilterText;
    private string?     _dialogFilterParseError = null;
    private FilterNode?  _dialogFilterAst        = null;

    // Server-side sort for the picker — forwarded to SqlRunService as ORDER BY, same as
    // the Runs page, so a header click sorts the whole result set, not just the page.
    private string _dialogSortField      = "StartTime";
    private bool   _dialogSortDescending = true;

    private static readonly string[] DialogSearchableFields = ["RunId", "Description"];
    private static readonly FilterParser DialogFilterParser = new(DialogSearchableFields);

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] _dialogFieldHints =
    [
        ("run / runid",                 "run identifier"),
        ("type",                        "run type"),
        ("status",                      "Running / Completed / Failed"),
        ("start / started",             "start time"),
        ("end / ended / finish",        "end time"),
        ("desc / description",          "description"),
    ];

    // ── JS interop ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private string _instanceKey = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");
    private ElementReference _canvasRef;
    private ElementReference _bottomRef;
    private ElementReference _importWrapRef;
    private IJSObjectReference? _tlModule;
    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;
    private CancellationTokenSource? _renderDebounce;
    private const int RenderDebounceMs = 300;

    // TabService.NotifyChanged fires very often (every BeginLoading/EndLoading on every
    // open tab), re-running OnParametersSetAsync on every open tab, not just the one
    // whose loading state actually changed. Without this guard, every one of those
    // unrelated notifications made a JS interop round trip here even though IsFocused
    // hadn't actually changed.
    private bool _previousIsFocused = true;

    // Set by control-bar handlers so OnAfterRenderAsync pushes data to JS
    // AFTER Blazor finishes the render.
    private bool _pendingJsPush = false;

    // ── Lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _dialogEnv = Environment;

        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(InitialRunId))
        {
            await LoadRunsAsync(Environment, InitialRunId);
        }
    }

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (_tlModule is null) return;
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        await _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("setVisible", _instanceKey, IsFocused);
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            try
            {
                _appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=7");
                _tlModule  = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/d3-timeline.js?v=15");
                await _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("init", _instanceKey, _canvasRef, _bottomRef, GetOptions());
                await _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("setHoverDelaysMs", _instanceKey,
                    Math.Max(0, TimelineOptions.Value.HighlightDelayMs),
                    Math.Max(0, TimelineOptions.Value.PopupDelayMs));
                await PushDataAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.LogError(ex, "Timeline JS init error");
            }
        }
        else if (_pendingJsPush && _tlModule is not null)
        {
            // Push runs here — AFTER Blazor has committed the render batch (including
            // MudBlazor's popover close). This prevents the double-batch race that
            // causes "Cannot read properties of null (reading 'removeChild')".
            _pendingJsPush = false;
            await PushDataAsync();
        }
    }

    protected override bool ShouldRender() => IsFocused || _tlModule is null;

    // ── Batch loading ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task LoadRunsAsync(string env, string runId)
    {
        Tab?.BeginLoading();
        TabService.NotifyChanged();
        await _runLock.WaitAsync();
        try
        {
            var existing = _runs.FirstOrDefault(b => b.RunId == runId && b.Env == env);
            if (existing is not null)
            {
                // Already loaded — refresh/merge events.
                await existing.RefreshAsync(RunService);
            }
            else
            {
                var batch = new TimelineRun(env, runId, RunService, RunEvents,
                    onUpdated: async () => await DebouncedPushAsync(),
                    logger: TimelineRunLogger);
                await batch.LoadAsync();
                _runs.Add(batch);
            }
        }
        finally
        {
            _runLock.Release();
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
        }

        await DebouncedPushAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task RemoveAsync(string runId, string env)
    {
        await _runLock.WaitAsync();
        try
        {
            var batch = _runs.FirstOrDefault(b => b.RunId == runId && b.Env == env);
            if (batch is not null)
            {
                await batch.DisposeAsync();
                _runs.Remove(batch);
            }
        }
        finally { _runLock.Release(); }

        await DebouncedPushAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private async Task RemoveAllAsync()
    {
        await _runLock.WaitAsync();
        try
        {
            foreach (var b in _runs) await b.DisposeAsync();
            _runs.Clear();
        }
        finally { _runLock.Release(); }

        await DebouncedPushAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── D3 data push ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task DebouncedPushAsync()
    {
        _renderDebounce?.Cancel();
        _renderDebounce?.Dispose();
        _renderDebounce = new CancellationTokenSource();
        var token = _renderDebounce.Token;

        try
        {
            await Task.Delay(RenderDebounceMs, token);
            if (!token.IsCancellationRequested)
                await InvokeAsync(PushDataAsync);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
    }

    private async Task PushDataAsync()
    {
        if (_tlModule is null) return;
        try
        {
            var payload = BuildPayload();
            await _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("update", _instanceKey, payload);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Timeline push error");
        }
    }

    private object BuildPayload()
    {
        return new
        {
            groupBy   = _groupBy.ToString(),
            colourBy  = _colourBy.ToString(),
            stackView = _stackView,
            filter    = _filterText,
            batches   = _runs.Select(b => new
            {
                runId             = b.RunId,
                env               = b.Env,
                batchName         = b.Description,
                isLive            = b.IsLive,
                batchStartEpochMs = new DateTimeOffset(b.RunStart).ToUnixTimeMilliseconds(),
                events    = b.Events.Select(e => new
                {
                    name      = e.Name,
                    source    = e.Source,
                    pipeline  = e.Pipeline,
                    service   = e.Service,
                    processId = e.ProcessId,
                    server    = e.Server,
                    startMs  = (e.Start - b.RunStart).TotalMilliseconds,
                    finishMs = e.Finish.HasValue ? (e.Finish.Value - b.RunStart).TotalMilliseconds : (double?)null,
                    error    = e.Error,
                    status      = e.IsError ? "error" : e.IsDone ? "done" : "inprogress",
                }).ToList(),
            }).ToList(),
        };
    }

    private object GetOptions() => new
    {
        groupBy  = _groupBy.ToString(),
        colourBy = _colourBy.ToString(),
    };

    // ── Control bar handlers ──────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnGroupByChanged(GroupByOption v)
    {
        _groupBy = v;
        _pendingJsPush = true;
    }

    private void OnColourByChanged(ColourByOption v)
    {
        _colourBy = v;
        _pendingJsPush = true;
    }

    private void OnFilterChanged(string v)
    {
        _filterText = v;
        _ = InvokeAsync(PushDataAsync);
    }

    private void ToggleStackView()
    {
        _stackView = !_stackView;
        _pendingJsPush = true;
    }

    private async Task ToggleTooltipAsync()
    {
        _showTooltip = !_showTooltip;
        if (_tlModule is not null)
            await _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("setTooltipVisible", _instanceKey, _showTooltip);
    }

    private async Task ResetView()
    {
        if (_tlModule is null) return;
        await _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("resetView", _instanceKey);
        await PushDataAsync();
    }

    private void ExportCsv()
    {
        if (_tlModule is not null)
            _ = _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("exportCsv", _instanceKey);
    }

    private async Task TriggerImport()
    {
        if (_appModule is not null)
            await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("clickInputInside", _importWrapRef);
    }

    private async Task OnImportFileSelected(InputFileChangeEventArgs e)
    {
        var file = e.File;
        if (file is null) return;

        try
        {
            using var stream = file.OpenReadStream(maxAllowedSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024); // 10 MB max
            using var reader = new System.IO.StreamReader(stream);
            var csv = await reader.ReadToEndAsync();
            await ImportCsvAsync(csv);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Logger.LogError(ex, "Timeline CSV import error");
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to import CSV: {ex.Message}", ex, "Timeline");
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Parses a timeline CSV export and upserts events into existing or new
    /// TimelineRun instances, grouped by RunId (§10 import spec).
    /// </summary>
    private async Task ImportCsvAsync(string csv)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(csv)) return;

        var lines = csv.Split('\n', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        if (lines.Length < 2) return;

        // Parse header to find column indices.
        var header = ParseCsvLine(lines[0]);
        int idx(string name) => Array.FindIndex(header, h => h.Equals(name, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

        var iRunId    = idx("RunId");
        var iName  = idx("Name");
        var iSource   = idx("Source");
        var iPipeline = idx("Pipeline");
        var iService  = idx("Service");
        var iPid      = idx("PID");
        var iServer   = idx("Server");
        var iStart    = idx("Start");
        var iFinish   = idx("Finish");
        var iError    = idx("Error");

        if (iRunId < 0 || iName < 0) return; // unrecognised format

        // Group rows by RunId.
        var byRunId = new Dictionary<string, List<PerformanceEvent>>();

        foreach (var line in lines.Skip(1))
        {
            var cols = ParseCsvLine(line);
            if (cols.Length <= Math.Max(iRunId, iName)) continue;

            var runId = cols[iRunId];
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(runId)) continue;

            if (!byRunId.TryGetValue(runId, out var evts))
                byRunId[runId] = evts = new List<PerformanceEvent>();

            string Col(int i) => i >= 0 && i < cols.Length ? cols[i] : string.Empty;

            DateTime? ParseDt(string raw) =>
                DateTime.TryParse(raw, null, System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles.RoundtripKind, out var dt)
                    ? dt : null;

            var startDt  = ParseDt(Col(iStart))  ?? DateTime.UtcNow;
            var finishDt = ParseDt(Col(iFinish));

            evts.Add(new PerformanceEvent
            {
                Name      = Col(iName),
                Source    = Col(iSource),
                Pipeline  = Col(iPipeline),
                Service   = Col(iService),
                ProcessId = int.TryParse(Col(iPid), out var pid) ? pid : 0,
                Server    = Col(iServer),
                Start     = startDt,
                Finish    = finishDt,
                Error     = string.IsNullOrEmpty(Col(iError)) ? null : Col(iError),
            });
        }

        // Upsert into existing or new batches.
        foreach (var (runId, events) in byRunId)
        {
            await _runLock.WaitAsync();
            try
            {
                var existing = _runs.FirstOrDefault(b => b.RunId == runId);
                if (existing is not null)
                {
                    // Merge into existing batch.
                    foreach (var e in events)
                        existing.UpsertEventPublic(e);
                }
                else
                {
                    // Create a CSV-only batch (no live subscription, no polling).
                    var batch = TimelineRun.CreateFromCsv(runId, Environment, events);
                    _runs.Add(batch);
                }
            }
            finally { _runLock.Release(); }
        }

        await PushDataAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    private static string[] ParseCsvLine(string line)
    {
        // Simple CSV parser — handles quoted fields with embedded commas/quotes.
        var result = new List<string>();
        bool inQuote = false;
        var current = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
        foreach (char c in line.TrimEnd('\r'))
        {
            if (c == '"') { inQuote = !inQuote; }
            else if (c == ',' && !inQuote) { result.Add(current.ToString()); current.Clear(); }
            else current.Append(c);
        }
        result.Add(current.ToString());
        return result.ToArray();
    }

    // ── Add Run dialog ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OpenAddDialog()
    {
        _addDialogOpen  = true;
        _dialogSelected = null;
        _dialogPage     = 1;
        ParseDialogFilterText(DefaultDialogFilterText);
        await LoadDialogAsync();
    }

    private void ParseDialogFilterText(string text)
    {
        _dialogFilterText       = text;
        _dialogFilterParseError = null;

        FilterNode? node = null;
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(text))
        {
            try   { node = DialogFilterParser.Parse(text, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
            catch (FilterParseException ex) { _dialogFilterParseError = ex.Message; }
        }
        _dialogFilterAst = node;
    }

    private async Task LoadDialogAsync()
    {
        _dialogLoading = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            _dialogAll = await RunService.GetRunsAsync(
                _dialogEnv, DateTime.UtcNow, RunsOptions.Value.MaxResults,
                filter: new RunFilter
                {
                    FilterAst      = _dialogFilterAst,
                    SortField      = _dialogSortField,
                    SortDescending = _dialogSortDescending,
                });
            _dialogPage = 1;
            RebuildDialogPage();
        }
        finally { _dialogLoading = false; StateHasChanged(); }
    }

    private void RebuildDialogPage() =>
        _dialogBatches = _dialogAll.Skip((_dialogPage - 1) * _dialogPageSize).Take(_dialogPageSize).ToList();

    private void OnDialogPageChanged(int page) { _dialogPage = page; RebuildDialogPage(); }

    private void OnDialogPageSizeChanged(int size) { _dialogPageSize = size; _dialogPage = 1; RebuildDialogPage(); }

    private async Task OnDialogSort(string field)
    {
        if (_dialogSortField == field) _dialogSortDescending = !_dialogSortDescending;
        else { _dialogSortField = field; _dialogSortDescending = true; }
        await LoadDialogAsync();
    }

    private async Task OnDialogEnvChanged(string env)
    {
        _dialogEnv      = env;
        _dialogSelected = null;
        await LoadDialogAsync();
    }

    private async Task OnDialogFilterChanged(string text)
    {
        _dialogSelected = null;
        ParseDialogFilterText(text);

        if (_dialogFilterParseError is not null) { StateHasChanged(); return; }
        await LoadDialogAsync();
    }

    private async Task ConfirmAdd()
    {
        if (_dialogSelected is null) return;
        _addDialogOpen = false;
        await LoadRunsAsync(_dialogEnv, _dialogSelected.RunId);
        // Push immediately regardless of pause state — user explicitly added a batch.
        await PushDataAsync();
    }

    // ── Dialog row selection ───────────────────────────────────────────────

    private void OnDialogRowClick(RunSummary item) =>
        _dialogSelected = _dialogSelected?.RunId == item.RunId ? null : item;

    private async Task OnDialogRowDoubleClick(RunSummary item)
    {
        _dialogSelected = item;
        await ConfirmAdd();
    }

    private bool IsAlreadyLoaded(RunSummary b) =>
        _runs.Any(x => x.RunId == b.RunId && x.Env == _dialogEnv);

    // ── Dispose ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        _renderDebounce?.Cancel();
        _renderDebounce?.Dispose();

        await _runLock.WaitAsync();
        try { foreach (var b in _runs) await b.DisposeAsync(); }
        finally { _runLock.Release(); }

        if (_tlModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _tlModule.InvokeVoidAsync("dispose", _instanceKey); }
            catch (Exception) { }
            try { await _tlModule.DisposeAsync(); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.DisposeAsync(); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }

    // ── Enums ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    public enum GroupByOption
    {
        ServicePipeline,
        ServicePidPipeline,
        Service,
        Pipeline,
        Pid,
    }

    public enum ColourByOption
    {
        Source,
        Pipeline,
        Service,
        Status,
    }
}

@code {
    private static string FormatDuration(TimeSpan ts) =>
        ts.TotalHours >= 1
            ? $"{(int)ts.TotalHours}h {ts.Minutes:D2}m"
            : $"{ts.Minutes}m {ts.Seconds:D2}s";
}

         during the initial HTTP response, then AGAIN once the real SignalR circuit
         connects — every data-fetching page was silently double-querying on first
         load. Skipping prerendering costs a slightly later first paint but halves
         every page's initial load work. -->

    <script>
    (function () {
        // Blazor calls these functions on the window object during reconnect attempts.
        var _attempt = 0;
        window.Blazor = window.Blazor || {};

        // Override default reconnect UI handlers so we control the dialog.
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            var ui   = document.getElementById('blazor-error-ui');
            var title = document.getElementById('bm-reconnect-title');
            var msg   = document.getElementById('bm-reconnect-msg');
            if (!ui) return;

            // Blazor exposes reconnection handlers via blazor.reconnection
            // We patch them after Blazor loads.
            var patch = function () {
                if (!window.Blazor?._internal?.navigationManager) {
                    setTimeout(patch, 200);
                    return;
                }
                var orig = window.Blazor._internal.reconnectionDisplay || {};
                window.Blazor.reconnect = window.Blazor.reconnect || {};

                // Called when reconnection starts
                window.Blazor._internal.reconnectionDisplay = {
                    show: function () {
                        _attempt = 0;
                        title.textContent = 'Connection lost';
                        msg.textContent   = 'Reconnecting…';
                        ui.style.display  = '';
                    },
                    update: function (attempt) {
                        _attempt = attempt;
                        title.textContent = 'Reconnecting…';
                        msg.textContent   = 'Attempt ' + attempt + ' of 3 — if this persists, reload the page.';
                    },
                    hide: function () {
                        ui.style.display = 'none';
                    },
                    failed: function () {
                        title.textContent = 'Unable to reconnect';
                        msg.textContent   = 'The server connection was lost and could not be restored. Reload to continue.';
                    },
                    rejected: function () {
                        title.textContent = 'Session expired';
                        msg.textContent   = 'This session is no longer valid. Reload to start a new session.';
                    }
                };
            };
            patch();
        });
    })();
    </script>

    <!-- D3 v7 library -->
    <script src="https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js"></script>

    <!-- ELK (layered layout with true orthogonal edge routing + fixed ports) for the
         run-detail flow graph. Replaces dagre: routes edges in channels between blocks
         (never through them), minimises crossings, and connects to per-pipeline ports.
         elk.bundled.js inlines the web-worker, so it's a single global `ELK` constructor. -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/elkjs@0.9.3/lib/elk.bundled.js"></script>

    <!-- Memory charts -->
    <script src="js/d3-memory-sunburst.js?v=2"></script>
    <script src="js/d3-memory-stacked.js?v=1"></script>

    <!-- Home memory treemap -->
    <script src="js/d3-home-treemap.js?v=20"></script>

    <!-- Interactive JSON tree viewer -->
    <script src="js/json-viewer.js?v=1"></script>

    <!-- Client-side (browser-native) log file access — File System Access API -->
    <script src="js/log-file-access.js?v=7"></script>

    <!-- Load MudBlazor script first, then append blazor.server.js once MudBlazor finished loading.
         This ensures MudBlazor registers its global JS functions (e.g. mudElementRef.*)
         before Blazor starts invoking them. A fallback loads blazor.server.js even if Mud fails. -->
    <script>
        (function(){
            var mud = document.createElement('script');
            mud.src = '_content/MudBlazor/MudBlazor.min.js';
            mud.onload = function() {
                var blazor = document.createElement('script');
                blazor.src = '_framework/blazor.server.js';
                document.body.appendChild(blazor);
            };
            mud.onerror = function() {
                // If MudBlazor fails to load, still start Blazor to show the error fast.
                var blazor = document.createElement('script');
                blazor.src = '_framework/blazor.server.js';
                document.body.appendChild(blazor);
            };
            // Insert Mud script synchronously into head so it begins loading immediately
            document.head.appendChild(mud);
        })();
    </script>

    <!-- Browser title + theme helpers -->
    <script>
        window.bmSetTitle = function(t) { document.title = t; };
        window.bmSetTheme = function(isDark) {
            document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', isDark ? 'dark' : 'light');
        };
    </script>

    <!-- Local log file picker + test log generator -->
    <script>
        window._localFiles = new Map();

        window.bmSetWsRef = function (ref) { window._wsRef = ref; };

        // Preserves the scroll position of a scrollable container across a Blazor
        // re-render (e.g. a background poll refreshing a table), so a periodic update
        // never yanks the user back to the top. save() is called just before the render
        // that would reset scroll, restore() right after it commits.
        window.bmScrollKeep = (function () {
            var store = new WeakMap();
            function scroller(root) {
                if (!root) return null;
                // MudTable's fixed-header mode scrolls an inner container; fall back to root.
                return root.querySelector('.mud-table-container') || root;
            }
            return {
                save: function (root) {
                    var el = scroller(root);
                    if (el) store.set(root, el.scrollTop);
                },
                restore: function (root) {
                    var el = scroller(root);
                    if (el && store.has(root)) el.scrollTop = store.get(root);
                }
            };
        })();

        window.bmOpenLocalLogFile = function (dotnetRef) {
            var input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'file';
            input.accept = '.log,.txt,.csv';
            input.style.display = 'none';
            document.body.appendChild(input);
            input.onchange = function (e) {
                var file = e.target.files[0];
                document.body.removeChild(input);
                if (!file) return;
                var reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (ev) {
                    var key = (crypto.randomUUID ? crypto.randomUUID() : Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36));
                    window._localFiles.set(key, ev.target.result);
                    dotnetRef.invokeMethodAsync('OnLocalFileOpened', key, file.name);
                };
                reader.readAsText(file);
            };
            input.click();
        };


        window.bmGenerateTestLog = function () {
            var services  = ['OrderService', 'PaymentService', 'NotificationSvc', 'InventoryService', 'AuthService'];
            var hosts     = ['srv-01', 'srv-02', 'srv-03', 'srv-04'];
            var levels    = ['INFO','INFO','INFO','INFO','DEBUG','DEBUG','WARN','WARN','ERROR'];
            var callers   = ['Service.Execute','Worker.ProcessAsync','Handler.Handle','Repository.SaveAsync','Pipeline.Run'];
            var msgs_info = [
                'Request processed successfully in {n}ms',
                'Batch {b} completed: {n} items processed',
                'Connection established to {host}:{port}',
                'Cache hit for key={k} (ttl={n}s remaining)',
                'Scheduled job started: interval={n}s',
                'Health check passed for component={c}',
            ];
            var msgs_warn = [
                'Slow query detected: {n}ms for table={t}',
                'Retry attempt {n}/3 for operation={op}',
                'Queue depth high: {n} pending messages|partition={p}',
                'Rate limit approaching: {n}/100 requests used',
                'Memory usage at {n}% of configured limit',
            ];
            var msgs_debug = [
                'Processing item id={n} batch={b}',
                'Deserializing payload size={n} bytes',
                'Acquiring lock on resource={r}',
                'Evaluating rule {n} of {m}',
            ];

            function pick(arr) { return arr[Math.floor(Math.random() * arr.length)]; }
            function tmpl(s, n) {
                return s.replace('{n}', n || Math.floor(Math.random()*1000))
                        .replace('{b}', Math.floor(Math.random()*50))
                        .replace('{k}', 'key-' + Math.floor(Math.random()*999))
                        .replace('{t}', 'orders')
                        .replace('{op}', 'db-write')
                        .replace('{p}', Math.floor(Math.random()*4))
                        .replace('{r}', 'resource-' + Math.floor(Math.random()*10))
                        .replace('{m}', '12')
                        .replace('{c}', 'kafka')
                        .replace('{host}', pick(hosts))
                        .replace('{port}', 9092);
            }

            var lines = [];
            var start = new Date(Date.now() - 3 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
            var errors = ['System.InvalidOperationException','System.TimeoutException','System.IO.IOException','System.NullReferenceException'];
            var i = 0;

            while (i < 6000) {
                var ts  = new Date(start.getTime() + i * 1800);
                var iso = ts.toISOString().replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 23);
                var lvl = pick(levels);
                var svc = pick(services);
                var host = pick(hosts);
                var pid = 1000 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 8999);
                var caller = svc + '.' + pick(callers);
                var msg;

                var tid = 10 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 90);
                if (lvl === 'ERROR') {
                    var errType = pick(errors);
                    var lineNo  = 40 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 200);
                    msg = 'Unhandled exception in ' + caller + ': ' + errType.split('.').pop() + ' at step ' + (i % 20);
                    lines.push(iso + '|' + lvl + '|' + host + '|' + pid + '|' + tid + '|' + msg + '|' + caller);
                    lines.push('   ' + errType + ': Operation failed after ' + (i % 5 + 1) + ' retries');
                    lines.push('   at ' + caller + '() in ' + svc + '.cs:line ' + lineNo);
                    lines.push('   at System.Threading.Tasks.Task.Run(Action action)');
                    i += 4;
                } else if (lvl === 'WARN') {
                    msg = tmpl(pick(msgs_warn));
                    lines.push(iso + '|' + lvl + '|' + host + '|' + pid + '|' + tid + '|' + msg + '|' + caller);
                    i++;
                } else if (lvl === 'DEBUG') {
                    msg = tmpl(pick(msgs_debug));
                    lines.push(iso + '|' + lvl + '|' + host + '|' + pid + '|' + tid + '|' + msg + '|' + caller);
                    i++;
                } else {
                    msg = tmpl(pick(msgs_info));
                    lines.push(iso + '|' + lvl + '|' + host + '|' + pid + '|' + tid + '|' + msg + '|' + caller);
                    i++;
                }
            }

            bmSaveFile('test-app.log', lines.join('\n'), 'text/plain');
        };
    </script>

    <!-- File download helper — global so any Blazor component can call it via IJSRuntime -->
    <script>
        window.bmSaveFile = async function(filename, content, mimeType) {
            if (window.showSaveFilePicker) {
                try {
                    const ext  = filename.includes('.') ? '.' + filename.split('.').pop() : '';
                    const desc = mimeType.includes('json') ? 'JSON file' : 'File';
                    const accept = {};
                    accept[mimeType] = ext ? [ext] : [];
                    const fh = await window.showSaveFilePicker({ suggestedName: filename,
                        types: [{ description: desc, accept }] });
                    const w = await fh.createWritable();
                    await w.write(content);
                    await w.close();
                    return;
                } catch (ex) { if (ex.name === 'AbortError') return; }
            }
            const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mimeType });
            const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const a    = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), { href: url, download: filename, style: 'display:none' });
            document.body.appendChild(a);
            a.click();
            setTimeout(function() { document.body.removeChild(a); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }, 200);
        };
        // kept as alias so any older call sites still work
        window.bmDownloadFile = window.bmSaveFile;

        // Download raw bytes (Uint8Array / byte[]) received from Blazor
        window.bmSaveBytes = function(filename, bytes, mimeType) {
            const blob = new Blob([new Uint8Array(bytes)], { type: mimeType });
            const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const a    = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), { href: url, download: filename, style: 'display:none' });
            document.body.appendChild(a);
            a.click();
            setTimeout(function() { document.body.removeChild(a); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }, 200);
        };
    </script>

    <!-- Prevent text selection on double-click inside tables (dblclick triggers row actions) -->
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('dblclick', function (e) {
            if (!e.target.closest('.mud-table')) return;
            window.getSelection()?.removeAllRanges();
        });
    </script>

    <!-- Ctrl+Click copies a row; Ctrl+Shift+Click copies the whole table as CSV.
         Applies to every MudTable in the app (gated on .mud-table). -->
    <script>
        (function () {
            function cellText(td) {
                if ('value' in td.dataset && td.dataset.value !== '') return td.dataset.value;
                var clone = td.cloneNode(true);
                clone.querySelectorAll('svg, button, .mud-icon-root').forEach(function (el) { el.remove(); });
                return clone.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
            }
            function showCopyToast(message) {
                var el = document.createElement('div');
                el.textContent = message || 'Copied to clipboard';
                Object.assign(el.style, {
                    position:      'fixed',
                    bottom:        '28px',
                    left:          '50%',
                    transform:     'translateX(-50%)',
                    background:    '#3FB950',
                    color:         '#fff',
                    padding:       '7px 20px',
                    borderRadius:  '6px',
                    fontSize:      '0.8rem',
                    fontWeight:    '600',
                    fontFamily:    'var(--bm-font-mono, monospace)',
                    zIndex:        '99999',
                    pointerEvents: 'none',
                    opacity:       '1',
                    transition:    'opacity 0.35s ease',
                });
                document.body.appendChild(el);
                setTimeout(function () { el.style.opacity = '0'; }, 1400);
                setTimeout(function () { document.body.removeChild(el); }, 1750);
            }
            // Clipboard API needs a secure context (HTTPS/localhost). Fall back to
            // the legacy execCommand path so copy still works over plain HTTP.
            function copyText(text, message) {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(text)
                        .then(function () { showCopyToast(message || 'Copied to clipboard'); })
                        .catch(function () { legacyCopy(text, message); });
                } else {
                    legacyCopy(text, message);
                }
            }
            function legacyCopy(text, message) {
                var ta = document.createElement('textarea');
                ta.value = text;
                ta.setAttribute('readonly', '');
                ta.style.position = 'fixed';
                ta.style.top = '-9999px';
                ta.style.opacity = '0';
                document.body.appendChild(ta);
                ta.select();
                try { document.execCommand('copy'); } catch (err) { /* nothing more we can do */ }
                document.body.removeChild(ta);
                showCopyToast(message || 'Copied to clipboard');
            }
            // Expose globally so Blazor server-side code can invoke them via IJSRuntime
            window.copyText      = copyText;
            window.showCopyToast = showCopyToast;

            document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                if (!e.ctrlKey) return;
                var tr = e.target.closest('tr');
                if (!tr || !tr.closest('.mud-table')) return;
                e.preventDefault();
                var table = tr.closest('table');
                if (!table) return;
                var thead = table.querySelector('thead');
                if (!thead) return;
                var headers = Array.from(thead.querySelectorAll('th')).map(function (th) {
                    var label = th.querySelector('.mud-table-sort-label');
                    return (label ? label.textContent : th.textContent).trim();
                });
                if (e.shiftKey) {
                    var skipCols = new Set(headers.map(function (h, i) {
                        return (/^actions$/i.test(h.trim()) || h.trim() === '') ? i : -1;
                    }).filter(function (i) { return i >= 0; }));
                    var exportHeaders = headers.filter(function (_, i) { return !skipCols.has(i); });
                    var lines = [exportHeaders.map(function (h) {
                        return h.includes(',') ? '"' + h.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"' : h;
                    }).join(',')];
                    Array.from(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')).forEach(function (row) {
                        var cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td'))
                            .filter(function (_, i) { return !skipCols.has(i); })
                            .map(function (td) {
                                var t = cellText(td);
                                return (t.includes(',') || t.includes('"') || t.includes('\n'))
                                    ? '"' + t.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"' : t;
                            });
                        lines.push(cells.join(','));
                    });
                    copyText(lines.join('\n'), 'Copied ' + (lines.length - 1) + ' rows as CSV');
                } else {
                    var parts = Array.from(tr.querySelectorAll('td')).map(function (td, i) {
                        var hdr = headers[i] || '';
                        var val = cellText(td);
                        if (!val) return null;
                        return hdr ? hdr + ': ' + val : val;
                    }).filter(Boolean);
                    copyText(parts.join('\n'), 'Row copied to clipboard');
                }
            });
        })();
    </script>

         filter.js is pre-linked here as a modulepreload hint for faster first-use. -->
    <script type="module" src="js/log-viewer.js?v=29"></script>
